content.en:
Endless energy poured into Ye Tian's heart, and a large amount of primeval gold water was also refined into his heart, helping his heart complete its transformation.

Time flies, and a long time passes.

Ye Tian's heart finally completed its transformation, prompting the immeasurable blood to also begin its fifth blood transformation.

When the immeasurable blood was undergoing the fifth blood transformation, it was also rapidly refining Ye Tian's body, making his body stronger and stronger.

All the time, his strength is skyrocketing.

Finally.

The fifth blood transformation of Infinite Blood is complete!

At this moment, Ye Tian had already become a five-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

Moreover, he had mastered two primeval techniques, and his strength was truly invincible among the seven Blood Transformation Realms, and his strength was even very close to that of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

This is the horror of primeval geniuses!

"With my current strength, the Vajra Snake Clan, which made me feel terrifying at the beginning, is nothing now!" Ye Tian muttered.

If he makes a move against the Vajra Snake Clan, the entire Vajra Snake Clan will not be enough to fight.

Of course, he was still far from the level of the Hays Heavenly Ancestor, and unless his cultivation could step into the six blood transformation realms, he could beat the Hays Heavenly Ancestor.

However, it was so difficult to advance from the fourth Blood Transformation Realm to the fifth Blood Transformation Realm, and it would be even more difficult to break through to the sixth Blood Transformation Realm.

......

Universal City.

Ye Tian continued to use the Ancient Gold Water to refine his heart, but the effect was almost useless.

It's not that the Ancient Golden Water is useless to the Five Blood Transformation Realms, it's that his body is too strong and his heart is too strong, so the Ancient Golden Water will be useless.

He needs better resources to be able to refine his heart quickly, or he can rely on a large number of years to slowly refine his heart, but in that case, if he wants to break through to the six blood transformation realms, the difficulty will be very difficult.

"Hayes Heavenly Ancestor has been famous for countless years, and he has only been in the Blood Transformation Realm six times so far, and it is estimated that it is a similar problem to me, and he can't find the resources to help him impact the Seven Blood Transformation Realm. Ye Tian thought to himself.

If the Hays Heavenly Ancestor could break through to the Seven Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, it would be enough to rival the top nine Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and his status would far surpass the current one, and he could almost walk sideways in the territorial sea realm.

"I can only slowly find suitable resources, depending on my luck!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following years, he continued to cultivate, and at the same time transported some resources to the Terrans in the Wanlong Territorial Sea to help the Terrans improve their bloodlines and strengthen their heritage.

There were too many foundation-laying treasures like Golden Muscle Liquid, and some of them were even better, so Ye Tian took some back.

Under Ye Tian's cultivation, the foundation of the human race is getting stronger and stronger, although it is not as good as the blood transformation realm race, but the population of the human race is large, this is the advantage!

With such a large population, there are always some demons that can be born, no less than those ordinary clansmen of the Blood Transformation Realm race.

this day.

The human race is about to give birth to a second Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and he is also a boundary-breaking genius.

Silent Black Sea.

Ye Xingchen was impacting the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor Realm, and with the resources given by his father Ye Tian, it was not difficult for him to impact the Blood Transformation Realm.

After absorbing a large amount of golden muscle fluid, he began his first blood transformation.

And Ye Tian was also secretly observing his son's breakthrough, and he was relieved to see that his breakthrough was very smooth.

After a long time, Ye Xingchen finally broke through.

Rumble!!!!

The aura of a Blood Transformation Realm erupted from him, and at this moment, his strength was already comparable to that of a top-notch Second Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

This is a boundary-breaking genius!

After Ye Xingchen broke through, Ye Tian appeared.

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen said excitedly.

"Yes, you have broken through to a blood transformation realm, but your current strength is still too weak, put it in the gap of the territorial waters, any blood transformation realm creature can beat you. When you become the third blood transformation realm, I will take you into the territorial sea boundary rift. As for now, you are still practicing in the territorial waters of Wanlong. "

Ye Tian arranged.

"Yes!"

Ye Xingchen nodded.

......

In addition to Ye Xingchen, the newly promoted Boundary-Breaking Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, the Terrans also had a large number of ordinary Fusion Realm Heavenly Ancestors and three fifth-stage Boundary-Breaking Realm Great Ancestors.

It can be said that the current strength of the human race can already dominate the entire Wanlong territorial waters, and any force has to look up to the human race.

And all this is the credit of Ye Tian!

Perhaps it was Ye Tian who entered the territorial waters of Wanlong and gained a great opportunity, and let the human race take off, and many Heavenly Ancestors dreamed of entering the territorial waters to break through, so as to get the opportunity.

However, some of the weaker Heavenly Ancestors entered the territorial waters of the Ten Thousand Dragons and soon fell.

However, there are also Heavenly Ancestors who really got the opportunity, and their strength skyrocketed.

Somewhere in the territorial waters of Wanlong, there is a small fragment.

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor was cultivating here, and he found a special resource here, after refining, the bottleneck was relaxed, and there were signs of breaking through the three blood transformation realms.

After a long time, the bottleneck was completely broken.

Rumble!!!

The cultivation of the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor officially entered the Three Blood Transformation Realm.

At this moment, he was completely excited!

"It's been too long, and I've finally broken through to the three blood transformation realms!!!"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor felt that this time he came out of the Wanlong Territorial Sea, it was the most correct time.

In the past, he could be called the most powerful Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor in the Wanlong Territorial Sea, after all, those who were stronger than him had left the Wanlong Territorial Sea.

But as Ye Tian appeared, he gradually surpassed him, and his status was no longer there.

Now, the human race has produced a large number of Heavenly Ancestors, and his status is getting lower and lower, and no one takes him seriously.

In desperation, he broke into the territorial sea boundary and broke through, and with good luck, he found here, obtained resources, and hit the three blood transformation realms.

"I am now in the three blood transformation realms, maybe in the future there is hope to become four blood transformation realms, five blood transformation realms, and there is hope for surpassing the Endless Heavenly Ancestor. What about a boundary-breaking genius, as long as his cultivation is high enough, he can surpass him!"

He still didn't know that Ye Tian had become an ancient-level genius, and he had also been promoted to the fifth Blood Transformation Realm, and his combat power was invincible in the Seven Blood Transformation Realm.

If he knew, he wouldn't dare say such a big thing!

He did not return to the territorial waters of Wanlong, but continued to move forward.

He also wants to get more opportunities, so he doesn't want to go back until he becomes a real powerhouse!

Time flies, the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor continues to break through the cracks of the territorial sea boundary, and there is no clear direction, but he has also been attacked by blood transformation realm creatures a few times, but his luck is not bad, the ones who attacked him are not creatures with more than four blood transformation realms, and the most powerful ones are only three blood transformation realm creatures.

As a result, he escaped several times!

this day.

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor suddenly encountered a shock current vortex that had been difficult to appear for countless years in the shock current, and he was swept into it in an instant.
